notes: Per-action 4-frame walk_down row generated from a magenta chroma source.
Frames were cropped independently, background-removed with ImageMagick, edge-contracted by 1px, resized to max 192x192, and south-extended into 256x256 cells.
Mini helper identity keeps cream/milk-tea patches, a small task pouch, and blank file cards with no protected character look, text, or logo.
